name: OfferLetterGenerator
description: UiPath API Workflow that generates a PDF offer letter from candidate and offer details. Called by the BPMN process after HR submits interview results.

candidate_name.description: Full name of the selected candidate

package_lpa.description: Annual package in LPA (Lakhs Per Annum)

steps.name: Build Offer Letter HTML
steps.description: Constructs HTML offer letter from input parameters using a professional template.
steps.pseudocode: htmlContent = BuildOfferLetterHtml(candidate_name, company_name, role, package_lpa, joining_date, drive_id)

steps.name: Generate PDF via html2pdf.app
steps.description: Calls the html2pdf.app free API to convert HTML to PDF bytes.

steps.name: Base64 Encode PDF Response
steps.description: Encodes the PDF bytes as base64 string for passing through the process.

offerLetterHtmlTemplate:
Offer of Employment

{{company_name}}

Date: {{date}}

Ref: {{drive_id}}/OFFER/{{candidate_name_upper}}

Dear {{candidate_name}},

We are pleased to offer you the position of {{role}} at {{company_name}}. This offer is extended following your successful completion of the campus placement process conducted at BITS Pilani Hyderabad Campus.

Position{{role}}
Company{{company_name}}
Annual CTC₹{{package_lpa}} Lakhs Per Annum
Expected Joining Date{{joining_date}}
Employment TypeFull-Time, Permanent
₹{{package_lpa}} LPA

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by replying to this email within 7 days. This offer is conditional upon satisfactory completion of your degree and background verification.

We look forward to welcoming you to the team.

Warm regards,
Talent Acquisition Team
{{company_name}}

This offer was generated via PlacementOS (Drive ID: {{drive_id}}). Questions? Contact your TPO.
